                                                                                
 Usage: wmx scripts [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...                                 
                                                                                
 Manage deployed scripts and remote preview runs.                               
                                                                                
 Examples:   wmx scripts list --path-start f/team/   wmx scripts get            
 f/team/send_report   wmx scripts create f/team/send_report --file              
 ./send_report.py --language python3   wmx scripts run f/team/send_report       
 --data @args.json --wait   wmx scripts preview ./scratch.py --data             
 '{"customer_id":"123"}' --wait                                                 
                                                                                
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --help          Show this message and exit.                                  │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭─ Commands ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ list                                                                         │
│ get                                                                          │
│ create                                                                       │
│ update                                                                       │
│ delete                                                                       │
│ run                                                                          │
│ preview                                                                      │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
